productDisplayName: Baggit Women Auxi Baby Purple Wallet
description: Worry no longer about managing money, cards, mobile phone and coins in your tote bag! Organise your everyday essentials into this stylish mobile pouch from baggit. This timeless piece is on the top of our wishlist this year. A sophisticated addition to your accessory collection, you can carry this piece without a bag. Dimensions: 15 cm x 11 cm Crafted from corduroy with a flap with a magnetic closure A bow detail on the flap for style Two compartments and one zippered pocket Detachable shoulder strap Care Wipe with clean, damp cloth to remove dirt
